title: Ellie (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ellie''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Ellié Arcadium]]''' building located in [[Theed]]
*The [[First Order]] [[stormtrooper]] '''[[LE-2003]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[LE-914]], also known as '''Ellie'''
*The [[Unidentified Naboo child|Naboo child]] known non-[[canon]]ically as '''[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Ellie'''

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*The [[1983]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] '''[[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' (1977) 80]]'''

{{Disambig}}
